evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Uses wagmi v2 idioms (useReadContract, query.enabled, createConfig, cookieStorage, metaMask connector). USDC address on Base (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7c32D4f71b54bDa02913) is correct. However, useConnect return shape shown (isLoading, pendingConnector) is wagmi v1 — in v2 it's isPending/variables. Internal inconsistency lowers score under long-tail handling.
evidence.executability: Multiple fenced code blocks across many files but no consolidated install command block (install command only described in prose: 'analogous to npm install...'). useConnect destructures isLoading/pendingConnector which don't exist in wagmi v2 — TypeScript/runtime issues. Test file uses any cast to work around mock shape. No single bash install block extractable.
evidence.completeness: (a) no API keys needed and acknowledged; (b) install commands NOT in a ```bash block, only described in prose — critical gap for extractor; (c) no .env template block (env vars only discussed); (d/e) component code present in fenced blocks; (f) test command not provided as bash block. Missing extractable install and test commands.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Citations are bracketed numeric references [n] with no URLs. No canonical official docs URLs (wagmi.sh, viem.sh, docs.base.org) actually written out. Fails official-docs anchoring.

rubric_notes: Very long, prose-heavy. Install commands and test commands not in extractable bash blocks. useConnect API shape appears to mix v1/v2. Citations are numeric-only without URLs.
